prophecies.a: 圣母出现在科瓦达伊里亚的一棵小冬青树上，身穿白衣，光芒四射。她问三个牧童：「你们愿意把自己献给天主，承受祂愿意给你们的一切痛苦，作为对罪过的补赎，并为罪人的归化祈祷吗？」三个孩子回答「愿意」。圣母要求他们每月13日回到此地。
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady appeared on a small holm oak tree at the Cova da Iria, dressed in white and radiating light. She asked the three shepherd children: 'Are you willing to offer yourselves to God and bear all the sufferings He wills to send you, as an act of reparation for sins and for the conversion of sinners?' The children answered 'Yes.' Our Lady asked them to return on the 13th of each month.

prophecies.a: 圣母再次出现，告诉孩子们耶稣愿意在世界上建立对圣母无玷圣心的敬礼。她预告弗朗西斯科和雅辛塔将很快被接到天堂，但露西亚要在世上留更长时间。圣母向他们展示了被荆棘环绕的无玷圣心异象。
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady appeared again and told the children that Jesus wished to establish devotion to the Immaculate Heart of Mary in the world. She foretold that Francisco and Jacinta would be taken to heaven soon, but Lucia would remain on earth longer. She showed them a vision of the Immaculate Heart surrounded by thorns.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 弗朗西斯科于1919年4月4日因西班牙流感去世，雅辛塔于1920年2月20日同样因流感并发症去世。露西亚活到97岁，于2005年2月13日去世。圣母关于三个孩子命运的预言与事实吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Francisco died on April 4, 1919 from the Spanish flu, and Jacinta died on February 20, 1920 from flu complications. Lucia lived to age 97, dying on February 13, 2005. Our Lady's predictions about the children's fates matched the actual events.

prophecies.a: 圣母向三个牧童展示了地狱的异象：「你们看到了可怜的罪人要去的地狱。」孩子们看到一片火海，其中有恶魔和灵魂呈人形，像透明的燃烧黑炭，在烈火中翻滚，痛苦地尖叫哀号。露西亚后来记述说，如果不是圣母事先承诺会带他们上天堂，他们会被吓死。
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady showed the three children a vision of hell: 'You have seen hell where the souls of poor sinners go.' The children saw a sea of fire containing demons and souls in human form, like transparent burning embers, tumbling in the flames and screaming in agony. Lucia later wrote that had Our Lady not previously promised to take them to heaven, they would have died of fright.

prophecies.q: 第二秘密：一战结束与二战爆发的预言
prophecies.a: 圣母说：「战争（第一次世界大战）即将结束。但如果人们不停止冒犯天主，在庇护十一世的教宗任期内，将会爆发另一场更大的战争。当你们看到一个夜晚被一道不知名的光照亮时，你们要知道，这就是天主给你们的重大征兆：祂将以战争、饥荒和对教会及教宗的迫害来惩罚世界的罪过。」
prophecies.q_en: Second Secret: Prediction of WWI Ending and WWII
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady said: 'The war (World War I) is going to end. But if people do not cease offending God, a worse one will break out during the pontificate of Pius XI. When you see a night illuminated by an unknown light, know that this is the great sign given you by God that He is about to punish the world for its crimes, by means of war, famine, and persecutions of the Church and of the Holy Father.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 一战于1918年11月结束，与预言吻合。1938年1月25日，欧洲大部分地区观测到一次异常的北极光，被许多人视为预言中「不知名的光」。二战于1939年9月爆发，正值庇护十一世去世后数月（1939年2月去世），在其任期尾声。预言的核心要素——一战结束、异常天光、二战爆发——均与历史事实吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: WWI ended in November 1918, matching the prediction. On January 25, 1938, an extraordinary aurora borealis was observed across much of Europe, widely regarded as the 'unknown light' of the prophecy. WWII broke out in September 1939, months after Pius XI's death (February 1939), at the end of his pontificate. The core elements — WWI ending, the unusual light, WWII outbreak — all correspond to historical events.

prophecies.q: 第二秘密：俄罗斯奉献与共产主义扩散
prophecies.a: 圣母说：「为了阻止这一切，我将来要求将俄罗斯奉献给我的无玷圣心，并要求在每月首周六领圣体补赎。如果人们听从我的要求，俄罗斯将会皈依，世界将会和平。否则，俄罗斯将把她的错误传遍世界，引起战争和对教会的迫害。善者将被殉道，教宗将受许多苦，许多国家将被消灭。」
prophecies.q_en: Second Secret: Consecration of Russia and Spread of Communism
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady said: 'To prevent this, I shall come to ask for the consecration of Russia to my Immaculate Heart, and the Communion of reparation on the First Saturdays. If my requests are heeded, Russia will be converted, and there will be peace; if not, she will spread her errors throughout the world, causing wars and persecutions of the Church. The good will be martyred; the Holy Father will have much to suffer; various nations will be annihilated.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1917年11月俄国十月革命后，共产主义确实向全球扩散：东欧、中国、古巴、越南等国相继建立共产主义政权。冷战期间，教会在共产主义国家遭受严重迫害。苏联于1991年解体，部分信徒认为这与1984年教宗若望保禄二世的奉献仪式有关。预言中「俄罗斯传播错误」和教会迫害的内容与20世纪历史高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the October Revolution of 1917, communism did spread globally: Eastern Europe, China, Cuba, Vietnam and other nations established communist regimes. The Church suffered severe persecution in communist countries during the Cold War. The Soviet Union dissolved in 1991; some believers attribute this to Pope John Paul II's consecration in 1984. The prediction of 'Russia spreading her errors' and Church persecution closely matches 20th-century history.

prophecies.a: 圣母再次出现并重申祈祷与牺牲的重要性。她要求牧童们为罪人祈祷，并教他们在每串玫瑰经后加念一段新祷文：「我的耶稣，请宽赦我们的罪，救我们免于地狱之火，求你把众人的灵魂，特别是那些最需要你怜悯的灵魂，领到天堂里去。」
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady appeared again and reiterated the importance of prayer and sacrifice. She asked the children to pray for sinners and taught them a new prayer to add after each decade of the Rosary: 'O my Jesus, forgive us our sins, save us from the fires of hell, lead all souls to Heaven, especially those most in need of Thy mercy.'

prophecies.q: 圣母第五次显现与太阳奇迹的预告
prophecies.a: 圣母告诉孩子们：「十月份我会告诉你们我是谁，我要什么。我将行一个大奇迹，让所有人都能看到并相信。」她要求人们继续诵念玫瑰经，为战争的结束祈祷。
prophecies.q_en: Fifth Apparition and Announcement of the Miracle
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady told the children: 'In October, I will tell you who I am and what I want. I will perform a great miracle so that all may see and believe.' She asked people to continue praying the Rosary for the end of the war.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1917年10月13日，约7万人聚集在法蒂玛目睹了「太阳奇迹」（见第8条）。圣母预告的大奇迹确实在10月发生，有大量目击者。
prophecies.verdict_en: On October 13, 1917, approximately 70,000 people gathered at Fatima and witnessed the 'Miracle of the Sun' (see entry #8). The great miracle foretold by Our Lady did occur in October, with a massive number of witnesses.

prophecies.a: 1917年10月13日，约七万人聚集在科瓦达伊里亚。在持续约十分钟的时间里，人们目睹太阳在天空中旋转、改变颜色、向地面「俯冲」。当天一直在下雨，但奇迹发生后人们的衣服和地面都变干了。多家报纸包括反教权的《世纪报》都报道了这一事件。圣母在最后一次显现中说：「我是玫瑰经之后。」
prophecies.a_en: On October 13, 1917, approximately 70,000 people gathered at the Cova da Iria. For about ten minutes, witnesses reported seeing the sun spin, change colors, and 'plunge' toward the earth. It had been raining all day, but after the miracle, people's clothes and the ground were dry. Multiple newspapers, including the anti-clerical O Seculo, reported the event. Our Lady said in her final apparition: 'I am the Lady of the Rosary.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 太阳奇迹是法蒂玛事件中最有据可查的部分。《世纪报》（O Seculo）记者Avelino de Almeida在现场报道，描述了太阳的异常运动。多位在场的科学家和记者均留下了独立证词。1930年天主教会在调查后正式认可了法蒂玛显灵的超自然性质。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Miracle of the Sun is the most well-documented aspect of the Fatima events. O Seculo reporter Avelino de Almeida was present and described the sun's unusual movements. Multiple scientists and journalists at the scene left independent testimonies. In 1930, the Catholic Church officially recognized the supernatural character of the Fatima apparitions after investigation.

prophecies.q: 第二秘密中的异常天光征兆
prophecies.a: 圣母预告在更大的战争爆发前，天空会出现「一道不知名的光」作为征兆。
prophecies.q_en: The Unknown Light — Sign of Coming War
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady foretold that before the outbreak of a greater war, an 'unknown light' would illuminate the night sky as a sign.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1938年1月25日至26日夜间，欧洲、北非和北美大范围地区观测到异常强烈的极光，天空呈血红色。这是有记录以来最强烈的极光事件之一。露西亚修女明确将此认定为圣母预告的征兆。此后不到两年，二战于1939年9月爆发。
prophecies.verdict_en: On the night of January 25-26, 1938, an exceptionally intense aurora borealis was observed across Europe, North Africa, and North America, turning the sky blood red. It was one of the most intense auroral displays on record. Sister Lucia explicitly identified this as the sign foretold by Our Lady. Less than two years later, WWII broke out in September 1939.

prophecies.q: 第三秘密：身穿白衣的主教的异象
prophecies.a: 第三秘密由露西亚于1944年写下，密封后交给教会，直至2000年由梵蒂冈公布。内容为一个异象：「我们看到一位身穿白衣的主教（我们有预感他是教宗）……他穿过一座半废墟的大城市，半颤抖地、步履蹒跚地行走，一路上为遍地的尸体祈祷。到了山顶，他跪在一个大十字架前，被一群士兵射杀。」
prophecies.q_en: Third Secret: Vision of the Bishop Dressed in White
prophecies.a_en: The Third Secret was written by Lucia in 1944, sealed and entrusted to the Church, and not published by the Vatican until 2000. It describes a vision: 'We saw a Bishop dressed in White (we had the impression that it was the Holy Father)... he passed through a big city half in ruins, and half trembling with halting step, afflicted with pain and sorrow, praying for the corpses along the way. Having reached the top of the mountain, on his knees at the foot of the big Cross, he was killed by a group of soldiers who fired bullets and arrows at him.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 梵蒂冈将第三秘密解读为1981年5月13日教宗若望保禄二世遇刺事件。当天正值法蒂玛圣母首次显现64周年，教宗在圣伯多禄广场被土耳其枪手穆罕默德·阿里·阿杰卡射伤。教宗本人将自己的生还归功于法蒂玛圣母的保护。但预言中教宗被「射杀」而现实中教宗幸存，存在不完全吻合之处。部分神学家认为第三秘密还有更深层含义。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Vatican interpreted the Third Secret as referring to the assassination attempt on Pope John Paul II on May 13, 1981 — the 64th anniversary of the first Fatima apparition. The Pope was shot by Turkish gunman Mehmet Ali Agca in St. Peter's Square. The Pope himself attributed his survival to the protection of Our Lady of Fatima. However, in the vision the pope is 'killed' while in reality he survived, creating a partial mismatch. Some theologians believe the Third Secret has deeper meanings.

prophecies.q: 教宗若望保禄二世遇刺与法蒂玛的联系
prophecies.a: 1981年5月13日——法蒂玛圣母首次显现64周年纪念日——教宗若望保禄二世在圣伯多禄广场被枪击。教宗康复后，将那颗射中他的子弹送到法蒂玛圣殿，镶嵌在圣母像的皇冠上。他说：「是一只手开枪，但另一只手引导了子弹。」
prophecies.q_en: Pope John Paul II's Assassination Attempt and the Fatima Connection
prophecies.a_en: On May 13, 1981 — the 64th anniversary of the first Fatima apparition — Pope John Paul II was shot in St. Peter's Square. After his recovery, the Pope sent the bullet that struck him to the Fatima Sanctuary, where it was set in the crown of the statue of Our Lady. He said: 'One hand pulled the trigger, another hand guided the bullet.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 教宗遇刺发生在法蒂玛圣母首次显现的纪念日（5月13日），时间巧合令人瞩目。梵蒂冈官方将此事件与第三秘密中「身穿白衣的主教」异象联系。但异象中主教被杀，而若望保禄二世幸存；异象描述的场景（废墟城市、山顶十字架）也与实际遇刺地点不同。
prophecies.verdict_en: The assassination attempt occurred on the anniversary of the first Fatima apparition (May 13), a striking coincidence. The Vatican officially linked this event to the Third Secret's vision of the 'Bishop dressed in White.' However, the bishop in the vision is killed while John Paul II survived; the setting described (ruined city, mountaintop cross) also differs from the actual location of the shooting.

prophecies.a: 圣母要求将俄罗斯奉献给她的无玷圣心，承诺如果奉献完成，俄罗斯将皈依，世界将获得和平。若不遵从，俄罗斯将「把她的错误传遍世界」。
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady requested the consecration of Russia to her Immaculate Heart, promising that if done, Russia would be converted and there would be peace. If not, Russia would 'spread her errors throughout the world.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1984年3月25日，教宗若望保禄二世举行了世界奉献仪式（未明确指名俄罗斯）。露西亚修女后来表示天堂接受了此次奉献。1991年苏联解体，部分信徒认为这是奉献的成果。但争议持续存在：奉献是否符合圣母要求的形式（由教宗联合全球主教、明确指名俄罗斯）仍有分歧；且世界并未因此获得持久和平。
prophecies.verdict_en: On March 25, 1984, Pope John Paul II performed a consecration of the world (without explicitly naming Russia). Sister Lucia later indicated that heaven accepted this consecration. The Soviet Union dissolved in 1991, which some believers attribute to the consecration. However, debate continues: whether the consecration met Our Lady's exact requirements (by the Pope together with all bishops, explicitly naming Russia) remains disputed; and the world has not achieved lasting peace.

prophecies.q: 弗朗西斯科和雅辛塔之死的预言
prophecies.a: 在1917年6月的第二次显现中，圣母告诉露西亚：「我很快就会带弗朗西斯科和雅辛塔去天堂。但你要在世上留更长时间。耶稣愿意利用你来使人认识我、爱我。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy of Francisco and Jacinta's Deaths
prophecies.a_en: During the second apparition in June 1917, Our Lady told Lucia: 'I will take Francisco and Jacinta soon. But you are to stay here some time longer. Jesus wishes to make use of you to make me known and loved.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 弗朗西斯科于1919年4月4日去世（10岁），雅辛塔于1920年2月20日去世（9岁），两人均死于1918年西班牙流感大流行的后遗症。露西亚活到97岁，于2005年去世，一生致力于传播法蒂玛讯息。预言完全吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Francisco died on April 4, 1919 (age 10) and Jacinta died on February 20, 1920 (age 9), both from complications of the 1918 Spanish flu pandemic. Lucia lived to age 97, dying in 2005, devoting her life to spreading the Fatima message. The prediction was fully accurate.

prophecies.q: 庇护十一世在位期间爆发更大战争的预言
prophecies.a: 圣母明确指出下一场大战将在「庇护十一世的教宗任期内」爆发。
prophecies.q_en: Prediction of a Greater War during Pius XI's Pontificate
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady specifically stated that the next great war would break out 'during the pontificate of Pius XI.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 庇护十一世于1922年即位，1939年2月10日去世。德国于1938年3月吞并奥地利（Anschluss），1939年3月吞并捷克斯洛伐克，二战正式于1939年9月1日爆发。虽然全面战争在庇护十一世去世后半年才正式开始，但战争的前奏（德国的扩张行动）确实发生在其任期内。露西亚修女指出，1938年的吞并奥地利已构成战争行为。
prophecies.verdict_en: Pius XI assumed the papacy in 1922 and died on February 10, 1939. Germany annexed Austria in March 1938 (Anschluss) and Czechoslovakia in March 1939. WWII officially began on September 1, 1939. While the full war started about six months after Pius XI's death, the war's prelude (German expansion) occurred during his pontificate. Sister Lucia pointed out that the 1938 annexation of Austria already constituted an act of war.

prophecies.a: 圣母在多次显现中反复要求人们每天诵念玫瑰经，承诺如果人们听从她的要求，战争将结束、世界将获得和平。在最后一次显现中，她以「玫瑰经之后」自称。
prophecies.q_en: The Rosary and the Promise of Peace
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady repeatedly asked people to pray the Rosary daily during multiple apparitions, promising that if her requests were heeded, war would end and the world would have peace. In her final apparition, she identified herself as 'the Lady of the Rosary.'

prophecies.q: 法蒂玛天使的三次显现
prophecies.a: 在圣母显现之前的1916年，三个牧童报告天使三次向他们显现。天使自称「和平天使」和「葡萄牙的守护天使」，教导他们祈祷文并让他们领受圣体。天使说：「不要怕，我是和平天使。和我一起祈祷吧。」这些天使显现被视为圣母显灵的前兆和准备。
prophecies.q_en: Three Apparitions of the Angel of Fatima
prophecies.a_en: Before the Marian apparitions, in 1916, the three children reported three visits from an angel. The angel identified himself as the 'Angel of Peace' and the 'Guardian Angel of Portugal,' taught them prayers, and administered Holy Communion. The angel said: 'Do not be afraid. I am the Angel of Peace. Pray with me.' These angelic apparitions are considered precursors and preparation for the Marian apparitions.
